# t0lkim.dev

> Personal portfolio and project case studies by Mike Lott — Cybersecurity & Operational Engineering Technical Leader based in Singapore.

## About the Author

Mike Lott (t0lkim) is a cybersecurity leader with 15+ years of experience in Security Architecture, Counter-Censorship Engineering, and Infrastructure Security at companies including ExpressVPN, Facebook/Meta, and GoDaddy. CISSP and GSLC certified.

## Projects

- [TeenTidal](https://t0lkim.dev/teen-tidal/): Native iOS parental content filter for Tidal with two-layer explicit content filtering. Built in Swift.
- [pg-harden](https://t0lkim.dev/pg-harden/): PostgreSQL security hardening scanner checking SCRAM auth, SSL, and pg_hba. Built in Rust.
- [TidalPlaylistBuilder](https://t0lkim.dev/tidal-playlist-builder/): Build Tidal playlists from BBC programmes, CSV, and text files. Built in Rust.
- [TheStreamDeck](https://t0lkim.dev/the-stream-deck/): Raspberry Pi streaming audio appliance with touchscreen, VU meters, and 4-source switching.
- [PatronVault](https://t0lkim.dev/patron-vault/): Patreon media archival tool using cookie-based auth against JSON:API. Built in Rust.
- [CourseVault](https://t0lkim.dev/course-vault/): Teachable course archival tool with browser cookie extraction. Built in Go.
- [MMM (MyMediaManager)](https://t0lkim.dev/mmm/): Image/video organiser with deduplication and EXIF-based renaming. Built in Rust.
